summary: Replace preview repository_dispatch dependency with direct rsync of the current source checkout to the preview repository, then verify CSS on the synced repo and live preview.
bugClassification: Preview sync branch/source mismatch and indirect deployment dependency
rootCause: The live preview still returned 404 for hado_styles.css because the app workflow depended on the preview repository sync-preview workflow, while that workflow hard-coded cloning feature/app-3.0.0.0. Fix commits on the current source branch could therefore be absent from the preview repository, and CSS presence was not guaranteed until after the indirect sync completed.
externalizationDecision: Keep CSS externalized in hado_styles.css. The fix changes preview synchronization so the external stylesheet is copied from the same source checkout as index.html and is validated before and after publish.

previewSyncChange.removedDependency: repository_dispatch sync_app_preview path in the app workflow
previewSyncChange.newPath: Checkout current app source branch, rsync preview assets into mytemark2/hado_library-preview main, commit/push, dispatch Pages deployment, verify live URL.

workflowResult: pending-after-push; workflow now directly pushes current source checkout assets including hado_styles.css to the preview repository before dispatching Pages
minimumUserAcceptance: After push, confirm live preview hado_styles.css is HTTP 200, at least 100KB, and the page renders styled with 3.0.0.0 Update08.14.
